caption:
Neon night air hummed against my damp skin. 🌃 My cyberpunk bikini clung tight as I slipped under the heat-haze of the Mega-Sector's lowest rooftop. The city's hum was a seductive purr, but tonight it was all about the pulse beneath the metal and wet-silk shadows.

I adjusted the glowing holo-chains wrapped around my thighs. The scent of ozone and expensive risk filled the air. Below me, the streets were a river of flying cars, but I felt like I was perched on the edge of paradise. The thrill wasn't just about the height—it was the electric charge crawling up my spine from the holographic advertisement that flickered like a ghostly kiss across my skin.

I shifted to the edge of the glass railing. The wind tugged at my hair, lifting strands of copper and gold against my shoulder-blades. My eyes caught the glitter of the neon grid below, a thousand glowing eyes staring upward, waiting to follow me as I stood tall in my element. Every exhale felt like a performance, every heartbeat a rhythm track to the cyber-lullaby.

The air grew thick, charged with static and possibility. I leaned forward until my silhouette blurred into the lights. For one heartbea, I wasn't a wanderer in the concrete jungle, but a legend written in holograms—alive, dangerous, breathtaking.

#CyberpunkSquad #NeonSummer #HoloLove #CyberBabe #SciFiSex #TechThrill
